response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship, testing, and mentoring instincts, but does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The JD requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems on compute/storage/hardware; the resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments a decade ago and primarily web/product work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or systems-level C++ depth needed for a Technical Lead on an internal compute platform.
strengths: Long track record as senior/staff engineer at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog, Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated mentoring, workshops, and community teaching (TDD, Selenium course, Web Internals)
Some exposure to high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ experience documented
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership
Career profile is web/product full-stack, not systems/distributed compute engineering

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Strong general senior engineering and mentoring background
